public_target_only_regressions.question: What's the name of the fantasy film starring Sarah Bolger, featuring a New England family who discover magical creatures around their estate?

source_final_event.action_required: Confirm answer.
source_final_event.action_result: The Spiderwick Chronicles is the fantasy film starring Sarah Bolger, featuring a New England family who discover magical creatures around their estate.
source_final_event.environment_state: The Spiderwick Chronicles is a 2008 American fantasy adventure film based on the bestselling book series of the same name by Holly Black and Tony DiTerlizzi. It was directed by Mark Waters and stars Freddie Highmore, Sarah Bolger, Mary-Louise Parker, Martin Short, Nick Nolte, and Seth Rogen. Set in the Spiderwick Estate in New England, it follows the adventures of Jared Grace and his family as they discover a field guide to faeries, battle goblins, mole trolls and other magical creatures.
source_final_event.final_answer: The Spiderwick Chronicles

public_target_only_regressions.question: Which American audio engineer and clandestine chemist, who was a key figure in the San Francisco Bay Area hippie movement during the 1960s recorded the album "Old and in the Way?"

source_final_event.action_required: Provide information about Owsley Stanley's identity and his role in recording "Old and in the Way".
source_final_event.action_result: Owsley Stanley, an American audio engineer and clandestine chemist, recorded the album "Old and in the Way".
source_final_event.environment_state: Owsley Stanley (born Augustus Owsley Stanley III, January 19, 1935 – March 12, 2011) was an American audio engineer and clandestine chemist. Under the professional name Bear, he was the soundman for the rock band the Grateful Dead, whom he met when Ken Kesey invited them to an Acid Test party. As their sound engineer, Stanley frequently recorded live tapes behind his mixing board. Owsley Stanley recorded the album "Old and in the Way".
source_final_event.final_answer: Owsley Stanley recorded the album "Old and in the Way".
